# cmccloudv2_mongo_backup (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
# create mongo backup
resource "cmccloudv2_mongo_backup" "backup1" {
    instance_id   = "b3d915fa-06ae-42a6-847c-cf71fc47a66c"
    name          = "mongo-backup1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String) mongo instance id
- `name` (String) Name of the backup

### Optional

- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) Created time
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `size` (Number) Size in bytes of backup

<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String)
- `delete` (String)
